name: Snickers Bar Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 Snickers bars, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
Cool Whip and peanuts for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1 1/2 cups milk, vanilla pudding, and 1/2 cup Cool Whip in a bowl. Beat until very smooth.
2. Fold in the candy bar chunks.
3. Spread the mixture evenly in the baked pie shell.
4. In another bowl, combine the remaining milk, Cool Whip, and chocolate pudding. Beat until smooth.
5. Spread the chocolate layer on top of the vanilla layer.
6. Garnish with additional Cool Whip and peanuts.
7. Refrigerate until set.
